cause_analysis.narrative: Body Celebration - Holistic Skincare & Wellness churned on 2026-03-31 after 266 days with Zoca. They sent an explicit cancellation request on 2026-03-02 via app_chat — 29 days before churn. Classification: explicit cancellation. The client formally asked to cancel; the question is whether a save attempt was made. 2 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days — this is the clearest operational failure on Zoca's side.
recommendations: [Retention] Cancellation was signalled 29 day(s) before churn via app_chat. Trigger an AM save call within 4 hours of any cancellation keyword — not a support response.
[Offer] Build a 3-tier retention offer ladder (pause / discount / scope change) so AMs have something concrete to counter with.
[SLA] 2 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days. Enforce a hard rule: every inbound gets a human response within 24h, every day of the week.

[SLA example] On 2026-03-31 via email, client wrote: "Subject: Re: I have some feedback\n\nBody: I am writing to formally demand the immediate removal of all Zoca-related scr…" — no outbound response in 30 days.

[SLA example] On 2026-03-31 via email, client wrote: "Subject: Re: I have some feedback\n\nBody: Hi Siddhi, I just got a message through Zoca, that someone wants to book me -…" — no outbound response in 30 days.
